metadata.title: AI Couple Photo Maker Online Free - Upload One Photo, Pick a Scene | Toolaze
metadata.description: Use AI Couple Photo Maker online free with Toolaze. Upload one or two couple photos, choose a preset scene like wedding, travel, or studio, and generate realistic couple images in seconds.

hero.h1: Free AI Couple Photo Maker Online
hero.desc: Upload one or two couple photos, choose a preset romantic scene, and generate realistic cinematic couple portraits in seconds with Toolaze.

howToUse.title: How to Make Couple AI Photos

steps.title: Upload Photos
steps.desc: Upload one or two couple photos (JPG, PNG, or WebP).

steps.title: Select a Template
steps.desc: Choose Style or Custom presets such as Rainy Paris, Proposal, or Beach.

steps.title: Generate & Download
steps.desc: Click Generate to create your 1K PNG couple photo and download the best result.

items.title: One or Two Photo Input
items.desc: Upload one or two reference photos to keep identity and couple chemistry in every generated scene.

items.title: Preset Scene Templates
items.desc: Pick from curated templates like rainy Paris, rooftop night, red carpet, sunset beach, and more.

items.title: Auto Ratio, 1K PNG Output
items.desc: Output settings are tuned for this workflow: Auto aspect ratio, PNG format, and 1K resolution.

items.title: Fast Couple Photo Generation
items.desc: Generate realistic editorial-style couple photos quickly from the browser-based workflow.

items.title: Style and Custom Templates
items.desc: Use ready-made style prompts or custom presets like Proposal, Beach, and Kitchen for faster iteration.

items.title: Simple Credit Rule
items.desc: Every generation uses 40 credits with fixed settings, so users get a predictable and consistent workflow.

intro.title: Why Use Toolaze AI Couple Photo Maker?

content.title: Scene-First Couple Photos
content.text: Most image tools need complex prompts to get romantic, high-quality couple results. Toolaze simplifies this flow with scene-first templates, fixed generation settings, and a visual process designed for fast success.

content.title: Built for Real Couple References
content.text: Upload one combined couple photo or two references when you want clearer identity anchoring. Templates steer composition and mood while keeping faces consistent.

comparison.title: Toolaze vs Other AI Couple Photo Makers
comparison.toolazeFeatures: One/two photo upload, Scene-first presets, Fixed optimized settings, Consistent romantic style workflow, Predictable 40-credit usage, Fast generation flow
comparison.othersFeatures: Prompt-heavy setup, Limited scene guidance, Inconsistent parameter defaults, More trial-and-error, Unclear credit expectations, Slower iteration

scenes.title: Wedding & Proposal
scenes.desc: Create romantic scenes for proposals, engagement announcements, and wedding-style portraits.

scenes.title: City Date Night
scenes.desc: Generate rooftop, night street, or red carpet vibes for premium lifestyle couple visuals.

scenes.title: Travel & Holiday
scenes.desc: Turn a regular couple photo into sunset beach, mountain, or vacation-inspired memories.

rating.title: AI Couple Photo Maker
rating.text: Create romantic couple photos with fixed quality settings and curated scene templates. Toolaze helps creators generate polished couple visuals quickly.

faq.q: How does AI Couple Photo Maker work?
faq.a: Upload one or two couple photos, select a scene template, then generate. The prompt and settings are optimized for realistic editorial-style output.

faq.q: Can I upload one photo or do I need two?
faq.a: Both are supported. You can upload a single couple photo or two reference photos depending on your source material.

faq.q: What settings are used for output?
faq.a: This page uses fixed settings: Nano Banana 2 model, Auto aspect ratio, PNG format, and 1K resolution.

faq.q: Can users switch models on this page?
faq.a: No. Model switching is hidden to keep the couple-photo workflow consistent for this landing page.

faq.q: How many credits does one generation cost?
faq.a: Each generation costs 40 credits. The credit rule is shown directly above the Generate button.

faq.q: Do templates include both preset and custom options?
faq.a: Yes. The template area includes Style presets and Custom presets such as Proposal, Beach, and Kitchen.
